message.content:
{"analysis":"The image is P3 format (text-based PPM), 2400x1800 pixels, max value 255. That's a large image. I need to sample pixel data to understand the pattern. Let me look at various parts of the image data.","plan":"1. Sample pixel data from various regions of the image to understand patterns
2. Check if it's a gradient, fractal, or other algorithmic pattern","commands":[{"keystrokes":"sed -n '4,6p' /app/image.ppm | head -5
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"awk 'NR>3 && NR<100 {printf "%s ", $0}' /app/image.ppm | head -c 500
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"awk 'NR>3 {count++; if(count%10000==1) print NR": "$0}' /app/image.ppm | head -20
","duration":2.0}]}
